goal: Close the unfinished A1 branch from v2 to a definitive PROMOTE/REJECT decision, then open exactly one next low-friction branch only if A1 fails promotion.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify base hours, days, thresholds, or execution logic
Nothing counts as improvement unless it passes strict additive integration, permissive integration, ownership, and cannibalization proof
Only one candidate branch open at a time; no parallel wide search
Medium-friction wave B is forbidden until A1 is closed and one low-friction branch (A2 or A3) is fully closed with no promoted candidate

stages.title: Аудит артефактов v2 и фиксация инвариантов v3
stages.objective: Clean up organizational debt from v2 before starting the new cycle: create a fresh v3 project, lock the single immutable reference, and define the hypothesis map.
actions: Open a new research_project for v3
Record an explicit v2 postmortem in research_record
Lock the single immutable reference: active-signal-v1@1
Create research_map axes: branch, data_layer, regime_type, acceptance_stage, final_decision
Define explicit branch status vocabulary: active, hold, rejected, promoted, watchlist
Record v3 invariants and closure discipline rules
success_criteria: Clean v3 project exists with no reference confusion
Branch closure discipline is formally recorded

stages.title: Полный forensic-review ветки A1
stages.objective: Recover and reproduce the exact logic and results of A1_high_iv_long_v1 from v2 artifacts before any new testing.
actions: Retrieve all A1 artifacts from v2
Reproduce exact A1 logic and record it formally
Check for drift or mismatch between v2 claims and actual reproducible results
Produce a concise trade anatomy for A1
Compute per-trade statistics
success_criteria: A1 is described strictly and reproducibly with no ambiguity
v2 claimed results vs v3 actual results are documented

stages.title: Stability и concentration для A1
stages.objective: Determine whether A1 survives as a genuine specialist-layer across time windows and is not propped up by a single lucky segment.
actions: Run window stability analysis on A1 (quarters, half-years, rolling windows)
Check stability across hour, day-of-week, and cl_1h conditions
Test resilience after removing the strongest historical segment
Perform concentration analysis on top trades
success_criteria: Honest verdict on whether A1 remains positive after removing any single strong segment

stages.title: Обязательная интеграция A1 в двух режимах
stages.objective: Close the main gap from v2: prove whether A1 is truly additive to the base by running both strict-additive and permissive integration modes.
actions: Run strict additive integration of A1 against unchanged base
Run permissive integration of A1 against unchanged base
Compare both modes against base-only performance
Compare strict vs permissive deltas
success_criteria: Complete integration picture for A1 exists with delta PnL, trades, profit factor, and drawdown vs base

stages.title: Ownership, cannibalization и proof of new entries для A1
stages.objective: Prove the nature of A1's delta: quantify overlap with base, truly new trades, replaced base trades, and coverage expansion.
actions: Compute trade overlap between A1 and base
Count truly new trades and replaced base trades
Run layer_compare and signal_ownership analyses
Check coverage expansion of the combined system
Answer definitively: does A1 genuinely expand the system?
success_criteria: Enough evidence to make a final PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT decision on A1

stages.title: Финальное решение по A1
stages.objective: Render a definitive verdict on A1: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST, or REJECT — no leaving the branch in limbo.
actions: Aggregate all evidence from stages 2–5
Apply decision rules: PROMOTE if additive with ownership proof, WATCHLIST if borderline but promising, REJECT if fails any hard gate
Record decision with main reason, revisit conditions, and notes
success_criteria: A1 is closed with a final irreversible decision

stages.title: Открыть ровно одну следующую ветку (если A1 не promoted)
stages.objective: If A1 was not promoted, select exactly one next low-friction branch and prepare it for clean testing — no wide search.
actions: Select exactly one branch: priority A2_iv_acceleration, fallback A3_broader_cl_transition
Prepare feature contract and hypothesis contract for the chosen branch
Do not touch wave B until the chosen branch passes plausibility, strict prototype build, and standalone test
success_criteria: Exactly one next branch is selected and ready for clean testing with documented rationale
stages.gate_hint: Activate only if A1 decision is not PROMOTE

stages.title: A2_iv_acceleration — проверка динамики IV
stages.objective: Test whether IV dynamics produce a genuine new specialist-layer, with a compact feature set and strict prototype discipline.
actions: Build a compact feature set (max 3–4 features) capturing IV dynamics
Run causality check, warmup check, and materialization check
Test on base_absent surface
Build max 2–3 strict prototypes
success_criteria: Either one mature A2 prototype passes plausibility and standalone, or an honest early rejection is recorded
stages.gate_hint: Activate only if A2_iv_acceleration was selected as the next branch in stage_7

stages.title: A3_broader_cl_transition — проверка расширенных classifier transitions
stages.objective: Test whether broader classifier transitions produce a genuine new specialist-layer with grouped transition features.
actions: Build transition features for broader classifier classes
Group transitions by semantic meaning
Test on base_absent surface
Build max 2 strict prototypes
success_criteria: Either one mature A3 prototype passes plausibility and standalone, or an honest early rejection is recorded
stages.gate_hint: Activate only if A3_broader_cl_transition was selected as the next branch in stage_7

stages.title: Контроль запрета на medium-friction wave
stages.objective: Enforce the hard gate: wave B is forbidden until A1 is closed and one low-friction branch is fully closed with no promoted candidate.
actions: Verify A1 is closed with final decision
Verify exactly one low-friction branch (A2 or A3) is fully closed
Confirm no promoted candidate exists before allowing wave B
success_criteria: Control table is filled: A1 closed, selected low-friction branch closed, wave B NOT opened prematurely
stages.gate_hint: Activate only after at least one of stage_8 or stage_9 is completed, or if stage_7 was skipped (A1 promoted)

stages.title: Финальный отчет агента
stages.objective: Produce a structured final report answering all mandatory questions about v3 results, A1 outcome, next branch outcome, and v4 recommendations.
actions: Document what was left unfinished in v2 and how v3 addressed it
Document how A1 was closed and whether it was a genuine additive layer
Document which next branch was chosen, why, and what it showed
State the main outcome of plan_v3
Provide explicit recommendations for plan_v4
success_criteria: Complete structured report covering all 7 mandatory sections exists

warnings: Plan text is in Russian; stage titles preserved verbatim for traceability
Stages 8–9 (A2/A3) are mutually exclusive alternatives gated on A1 not being promoted
